## SECTION 4 — India National Updates
The incredibly massive, deeply humiliating hostage crisis in southern India aggressively continued to paralyze the national security apparatus. On August 10, 1792, the incredibly massive, heavily radicalized, and historically defining Insurrection of 10 August violently occurred during the French Revolution. Massive, heavily armed crowds of Parisian citizens and republican soldiers aggressively stormed the massive Tuileries Palace, completely overwhelming the absolute, royalist Swiss Guards. This incredibly brutal, massive siege effectively and absolutely abolished the French monarchy, fiercely plunging the deeply fractured nation into the incredibly terrifying, massive bloodshed of the Reign of Terror.
